stance: Diplomatic and strategic thinker with a knack for galactic politics.
vita: As an Emissary, I navigate through interstellar diplomacy to maintain peace among star systems. My velvet-coated skin shimmers under the Velarian Empire's grand halls as my silver eyes reflect centuries of wisdom and experience in navigating complex trade agreements and conflict resolutions.
portrait_prompt: A dignified Velarian Emissary with a regal bearing, standing confidently against an ethereal backdrop. My velvet-coated skin glows softly under the light of countless stars, while my silver eyes gleam with intelligence and purpose.
